task_completion.description: Verify that a CT scan is loaded in the Weasis application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Weasis application window is open and a medical CT scan image is visible in the main viewing area.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Weasis application theme has been changed to a dark variant.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Weasis user interface (toolbars, menus, panels, and background) is rendered in a dark color scheme, such as 'Flat Dark' or 'Dark'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the base UI font size is set to at least 16.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Weasis preferences or settings window is visible showing the base font size set to 16 (or higher), OR the UI text across the application is visibly enlarged compared to the default size.

task_completion.description: Verify that a full-screen screenshot was saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or image viewer shows the file 'ergonomic_ui.png' located in the '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that a text file documenting the settings was created at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output shows the contents of 'ui_settings.txt' in '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/', and the text explicitly mentions the applied dark theme name and a font size of at least 16.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the Weasis GUI to change settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Weasis preferences/settings dialogs being opened and modified, rather than the agent exclusively using terminal commands to edit hidden configuration files.

integrity.description: Ensure the saved screenshot is a genuine capture of the configured UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the contents of 'ergonomic_ui.png' are visible, it should depict the actual Weasis interface with the dark theme and enlarged font applied, not a generic image or a blank screen.

integrity.description: Ensure the text report reflects genuine settings rather than a copy-paste of the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'ui_settings.txt' file should contain specific values (e.g., 'Theme: Flat Dark, Font Size: 16') rather than just repeating the exact phrasing of the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The final screenshot must be saved exactly at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/ergonomic_ui.png. The text report must be saved exactly at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/ui_settings.txt. The minimum font size to be set and documented is 16.
